title: ZEAYEA Cheese Slicer, Marble Cheese Cutter with 6 Wires, 5" x 8" Heavy Duty Cheese Cutting Board for Cut Block Cheeses, Butter, Fruit, Appetizers, White Marble
features: The marble slab is 8" L x 5" W, come with in total 6 pieces 304 stainless steel cutting wire for a long service life, perfect for cutting of cheeses, sandwiches, butter, fruit, vegetables, appetizers and more.
Natural Marble Material: Our cheese slicer is made of beautiful natural marble, which prevents moisture, odor, and grease, not easy to stick and very easy to clean, can serve you for a long term.
Clever Design: It is a clever design that allows the wire to pass completely and efficiently through the cheese into the groove below, an elegant way to slice different cheeses.

Anti-Slip Protection: There are 4 non-slip rubber pads at the bottom that increase the stability and safety of the cheese cutter, prevent sliding and avoid scratching the countertop or table when you are cutting.

Easy-to-Grip Handle: Easy to use with our cheese slicer for block cheese, the 3.5 cm length handle offers a comfortable grip, makes cheese cutting easier. This stylish design cheese slicer is a ideal gift for cheese lovers.
